world.title: Wife cannot be denied maintenance for seeking divorce after harassment: Bombay HC
world.description: Bombay High Court Nagpur held wife seeking divorce after cruelty can’t be denied Section 125 CrPC maintenance; upheld ₹5,000–₹7,000/month, arrears due.

world.title: Nashik & Trimbakeshwar will be split into tightly controlled sectors for Amrit Snan period: Kumbh Mela Authority commissioner
world.description: Nashik, Trimbakeshwar to be split into self-contained sectors for Simhastha Kumbh peak Amrit Snan days, banning inter-sector movement for crowd safety.

world.title: Mike James Q&A: 'Just because you're good enough for the NBA doesn't mean you're supposed to be'
world.description: The five-time All-Euroleague selection sat down with HoopsHype at the adidas Eurocamp to discuss his overseas career, and more.

world.title: Satej Patil attacks Centre over alleged corruption linked to Ram Mandir, say BJP’s sole agenda is to make money
world.description: Congress MLC Satej Patil alleges BJP corruption in Ayodhya Ram Mandir works, questions SIT and resignations, and urges longer Maharashtra voter mapping with more BLOs.

world.title: Canucks Select Forward Lucian Bernat 176th-Overall At The 2026 NHL Entry Draft
world.description: The Canucks have selected Lucian Bernat 176th-overall at the 2026 NHL Entry Draft.

world.title: Khidrapur villagers enforce lockdown to protest ASI curbs, over 1000 tourists return without visiting Kopeshwar Temple
world.description: Khidrapur villagers impose indefinite bandh over ASI rules; roads shut and Kopeshwar Temple closed, forcing 1,200 tourists to return without visiting.

world.title: Gang luring youth with lift offer busted; couple held
world.description: Panchkula Police arrest husband-wife duo in lift-pretext robbery; youth forced to withdraw Rs 22,000, robbed of phone and bike; hunt on for other suspects.

world.title: Banners projecting BJP’s Malhar Patil as “future MP” spark political row in Dharashiv
world.description: BJP ‘Future MP’ banners in Dharashiv promote Malhar Patil with #MP2029, fuelling Mahayuti seat tussle with new Shinde Sena MP Rajenimbalkar.

climate.title: Dozens killed by heat wave across Europe
climate.description: The heat wave brought new record high temperatures to France and Germany, caused the suspension of public services, and multiple reported deaths.

climate.title: STEPHEN DAISLEY: Only the Scottish parliament could hold an opening ceremony on the same day it shut up shop
climate.description: Only the Scottish parliament could hold an opening ceremony on the same day it shut up shop for two months of summer holidays. If nothing else, our MSPs have a sense of humour.

climate.title: King Charles urges MSPs to treat each other 'with respect and courtesy'

conflict.description: Central Zoo Authority approves Maharashtra’s first leopard safari park in Junnar, Pune: Rs 80 crore project at Ambegaon on 48 hectares to aid conservation and reduce conflict.
